venues.name: Vintry & Mercer Hotel
venues.description: Dog basket & bowl in room. Welcome in Vintry Kitchen & Mercer Terrace. No fee. Size limit TBC — verify with hotel before booking.

venues.name: Sea Containers London
venues.description: Up to 9kg. £35/stay + £100 deposit. Dogs not left alone. Dog blanket, bowl & welcome treat provided. Dogs welcome in restaurant.

venues.name: Park Plaza County Hall
venues.description: Any size. £25/night. Up to 2 dogs. Food & water bowls provided. Left alone policy TBC — confirm with hotel before booking.

venues.name: Novotel London Canary Wharf
venues.description: Any size. £25/night. Waterfront setting. Left alone policy TBC — confirm with hotel before booking.

venues.name: The Cadogan, a Belmond Hotel
venues.description: Any size. No fee. Dogs not left alone. Food bowls & grooming services available. One of London's finest dog-friendly stays.
